name: ˹Opus Music
description: A Telegram Music Player Bot, written in modern Python with Kurigram and Py-Tgcalls v1.2.9.

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID, available at https://my.telegram.org. Required to connect the bot to Telegram servers.

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash, available at https://my.telegram.org. Required alongside API ID.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot Token from BotFather after creating your Telegram bot.

MONGO_DB_URI.description: MongoDB database connection URI, used for storing user and bot-related data. Get it from https://cloud.mongodb.com.

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram numeric user ID (use any management bot to find it). Multiple IDs can be separated by a space.

STRING_SESSION2.description: Pyrogram v2 session 2 string for ub2.

LOGGER_ID.description: Chat ID of your log group where the bot sends important logs.

COOKIE_URL.description: Direct raw link to your cookies.txt file for yt-dlp.

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Heroku API key for updater features.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Heroku app name (required if HEROKU_API_KEY is set).
